description: The ProtectedRoute component queries permissions on every mount, but the permissions data rarely changes. Add staleTime and cacheTime to the useQuery config (e.g., staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000 for 5 minutes) to reduce unnecessary API calls and improve performance.
successCriteria: The permissions useQuery includes staleTime: 300000 (5 minutes)
The permissions useQuery includes gcTime: 600000 (10 minutes) for cache retention
Permissions are still refetched when user changes or on hard refresh
